descripciones.texto: You feel this way when you are really looking forward to something that is about to happen.
You feel this way when you have nothing interesting to do and time seems to pass very slowly.
You feel this way after something stressful finally ends and everything turns out fine.
You feel this way when someone close to you achieves something impressive, or when you achieve something yourself.
You feel this way when you don't understand what is happening or what to do next.
This person installs and repairs electrical wiring and systems in homes and buildings.
This person fixes leaking pipes and installs bathroom and kitchen water systems.
This person's job is to put out fires and rescue people from dangerous situations.
This person investigates and writes news stories for newspapers, websites, or television.
This person examines and treats sick or injured animals.
Light rain that falls in very fine, small drops.
A storm with strong wind, heavy rain, thunder, and lightning.
Weather with thick mist that makes it hard to see very far.
A thin layer of ice that forms on surfaces on very cold mornings.
A period of several days with unusually high temperatures.
A clear liquid made by boiling meat, bones, or vegetables in water.
A soft, thick mixture of flour and water (or other liquid) used to make bread or pastries.
A small dish served before the main course of a meal.
Any type of drink, especially one that is not water.
Salt, pepper, herbs, or spices added to food to improve its flavor.
A boat that regularly carries passengers and vehicles across a river, lake, or short stretch of sea.
An underground train system used to move around a big city quickly.
A small, light vehicle with two wheels and a platform to stand on, often used for short trips.
A vehicle that runs on rails along city streets, similar to a train but usually shorter.
A vehicle that hangs from a cable and carries people up and down mountains.
